zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Hode於1234年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Robin Hode54歲，母親Marion Miles52歲。他和Mrs Richard Hode至少有1個兒子。他去世於1289年在英國波克夏享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Hode于1234年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Robin Hode54岁，母亲Marion Miles52岁。他和Mrs Richard Hode至少有1个儿子。他去世于1289年在英国波克夏享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu) designating someone who lived by a woodland clearing, or for someone who came from a place so named, such as Road (Somerset), Rhode (Somerset), Road Farm in Colebrook (Devon), Rhode in Halberton (Devon), Roade (Northamptonshire), Rode (Cheshire), and Rodd (Herefordshire).
English: topographic name for someone who lived by a reed bed, from Middle English rode (Old English hrēod). See also Rude and Trude .
German: habitational name from any places called Rhode (Lower Saxony, Rhineland) and Rhoden (Hesse, Saxony-Anhalt, former Silesia).

variants.name: Rude
meanings: German (also Rüde): from a pet form of a personal name formed with Old High German hrōd ‘fame, renown’, for example Rudolf or Rüdiger (see Rudiger ).
German: from Middle High German rude, rüde ‘hound’, probably applied as a nickname or as a metonymic occupational name for a keeper of hunting dogs.
Norwegian: variant of   Ruud  .

variants.name: Rhodes
meanings: English:

either a topographic name for someone who lived by ‘(the) woodland clearings’, plural form of Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, principally Rhodes in Bury (Lancashire) or possibly from one of the many minor places in Yorkshire similarly named, or Rhodes Minnis (Kent). The Yorkshire name sometimes alternates with the singular form (see Rhode and Rode ). The Rh- spelling was introduced in the 16th and 17th centuries by clerks with a classical education, who associated the name with the Greek island of Rhodes, famous in ancient history and mythology. There is also no connection with modern English road (Old English rād ‘riding’), which was not used to denote a thoroughfare until the 16th century. The surname is particularly common in Yorkshire and Lancashire but occurs with various spellings in smaller numbers widely across England.
variant of Rhode , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Rood
meanings: Dutch: nickname for someone with red hair, from Middle Dutch ro(e)de ‘red’.
English: topographic name for someone who lived by a village or town cross (Middle English rōde, roode, Old English rōd(e)).

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a woodland clearing, from an unrecorded Middle English rōd(e), rood, Old English rēod(e). This name would have been synonymous with Road (see Rhode 1) and the two names were therefore interchangeable, especially in Somerset and Devon.

variants.name: Rudd
meanings: English: nickname for someone with a ruddy complexion, from Middle English rudde ‘redness, ruddiness, rosy hue’ (Old English rudu).
English: habitational name from Rhude in Holsworthy (Devon), apparently named from Middle English rude (Old English hrēod) ‘reed bed’. Compare Rhode 2.
American shortened form of any of various Jewish surnames beginning with Rud-.

variants.name: Rhoad
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): variant of   Rhode  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Rodd
meanings: English (Devon): variant of   Rhode  .
German: variant of   Rode   1.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Hode was born in 1234, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Robin Hode, was 54 and his mother, Marion Miles, was 52. He had at least 1 son with Mrs Richard Hode. He died in 1289, in Berkshire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Hode est né en 1234, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robin Hode, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Marion Miles, avait 52 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs Richard Hode. Il est décédé en 1289, à Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Hode 1234 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robin Hode 54 und seine Mutter Marion Miles 52. Er hatte mit Mrs Richard Hode mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1289 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hode è nato il nel 1234 nel Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Robin Hode, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Marion Miles, aveva 52 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs Richard Hode. Morì nel 1289, nel Berkshire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Hodeが1234年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robin Hodeは54歳，母Marion Milesは52歳であった。彼はMrs Richard Hodeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1289年にイギリスバークシュアイアで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Hode(이)가 1234년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robin Hode(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Miles(은)는 52세였다. 그는 Mrs Richard Hode(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1289년 영국 버크실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hode nasceu em 1234, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robin Hode, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Marion Miles, tinha 52 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs Richard Hode. Ele faleceu em 1289, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Hode родился в 1234 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robin Hode было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Marion Miles, 52. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs Richard Hode. Он умер в 1289 г. в местности биркшир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Hode nació en 1234, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robin Hode, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Marion Miles, tenía 52 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs Richard Hode. Murió en 1289, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
